quivern.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of Dragon Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

quivern-botan.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Grass and increases Attack by 5~20%.

ragnahawk.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 5~20%.

rainbow-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

rayhound.pe: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)

rayhound-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

red-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

reindrix.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

relaxaurus.pe: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

relaxaurus-lux.pe: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

renjishi.pe: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn 2~6. (Does not stack)

reptyro.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by 30~60%. (Does not stack)

reptyro-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by 35~65%. (Does not stack)

ribbuny.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

ribbuny-botan.pe: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by 200~400% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or

robinquill.pe: While in party, increases the player's bow damage by 10~35%. (Does not stack)

robinquill-terra.pe: While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

rooby.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

roujay.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

rushoar.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by 500~2000%.

sekhmet.pe: While at base, boosts Anubis's work speed by 20~40%. Increases efficiency by 30~60% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

selyne.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by 15~30%.

shadowbeak.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by 15~30% while mounted.

shaolong.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by 4~8% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

shroomer.pe: Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.

shroomer-noct.pe: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by 10~15%.

sibelyx.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

sibelyx-primo.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

silvance.pe: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to 40~60% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants i

silvegis.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by 30~60% and reduces damage taken by your shield by 65~80%. (Does not stack)

skutlass.pe: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: 2600~3900). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iai

skutlass-ignis.pe: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: 2900~4200). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapaci

slowatt.pe: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify, the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to 40~60% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not s

smokie.pe: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +100~200%.

smokie-cryst.pe: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

snock.pe: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify 2~6. (Does not stack)

snock-lux.pe: While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)

snugloo.pe: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

solenne.pe: While in party, increases the player's Attack by 30~80% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

solmora.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

solmora-lux.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 5~20%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

sootseer.pe: While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Neutral damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

souffline.pe: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

sparkit.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

splatterina.pe: While in party, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases by 100~200%. (Does not stack)

starryon.pe: Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +50~100% at night.

starryon-primo.pe: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)

surfent.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.

surfent-terra.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy 2~6. (Does not stack)

suzaku.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku)

suzaku-aqua.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)

swee.pe: While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.

sweepa.pe: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 12~24% for each Swee in party.

tanzee.pe: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

tanzee-ignis.pe: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

tarantriss.pe: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed.

teafant.pe: While in party, restores 20~40% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

tetroise.pe: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

tetroise-primo.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by 80~100%. (Does not stack)

tocotoco.pe: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

tombat.pe: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap.

tropicaw.pe: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

turtacle.pe: While in party, reduces Ore weight by 80~100%. (Does not stack)

turtacle-terra.pe: While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by 80~100%. Also improves player's and Pals' Ground damage to enemy weak points by 80~100%. (Does not stack)

univolt.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Electric damage to weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

univolt-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 5~20%.

vaelet.pe: While in party, Ground Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.

valentail.pe: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

vanwyrm.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by 20~40%. (Does not stack)

vanwyrm-cryst.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by 30~50%. (Does not stack)

venusa.pe: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind 2~6. (Does not stack)

verdash.pe: While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

vixy.pe: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

warsect.pe: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within 5~9 seconds. (Does not stack)

warsect-terra.pe: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within 5~9 seconds. (Does not stack)

whalaska.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigames start with the capture gauge increased by 5~14%. Additionally, while the bars overlap, capture progress increases by 5~14%. (Does not stack)

whalaska-ignis.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge 7~17% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by 7~17% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack)

wispaw.pe: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)

wistella.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

wixen.pe: When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 30~50%.

wixen-noct.pe: When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by 30~50%.

woolipop.pe: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by -20~-10%. (Does not stack)

woolipop-terra.pe: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by -25~-15%. (Does not stack)

wumpo.pe: Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

wumpo-botan.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status. (Does not stack)

xenogard.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by 10~35%. (Does not stack)

xenolord.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by 20~50%. (Does not stack)

xenovader.pe: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by 100~160%. (Does not stack)

yakumo.pe: Can be ridden. While fighting together, 15~30% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)
